description.en: My own SaaS — Eviro automates review collection for local businesses, turning happy customers into 5-star ratings on autopilot. Built with a modern full-stack (React, Node.js, GraphQL) and integrated with Google Business and other review platforms.
description.sk: Môj vlastný SaaS — Eviro automatizuje zber recenzií pre lokálne podniky a mení spokojných zákazníkov na 5-hviezdičkové hodnotenia na autopilote. Postavené na modernom full-stacku (React, Node.js, GraphQL) s integráciou na Google Business a ďalšie platformy.
